since_last: 37% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.47%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -1.33% · Gold -0.83% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 37% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.47%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.47%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.91%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.11%
cards.body: Leaders: TTD +2.00%, WDAY +1.32%, INTU +0.92%, MDB +0.85%, CRNC +0.76%. Laggards: MU -4.11%, AMAT -3.57%, TER -2.92%, KLAC -2.90%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.65% at $144.36
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.65% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
